reviews.comment:
La peor atencion de mi vida... Entre y salude dos veces, nunca tuve respuestas, al rato llego un "que necesitas" con la peor onda, pedis cigarrillos, algo super comun en una estacion de servicio y nunca pero nunca tienen, y claro porque a la chica de ojos saltones se le ocurre pedir solo camell y lucky, la verdad no se quien selecciona a este tipo de gente que no tiene la minima intencion de atender bien al cliente y claramente no sabe mucho de control de stock... Un desastre!!!

(Translated by Google)
The worst service of my life... I walked in and said hello twice, never got a response. After a while, I got a rude "what do you need?" I asked for cigarettes, something super common at a gas station, and they never, ever have them. And of course, because the girl with the bulging eyes decided to order only Camel and Lucky Strikes. I honestly don't know who hires these kinds of people who have absolutely no intention of providing good customer service and clearly don't know much about inventory control... A disaster!!!
